note: Fictional Rediem demo dossier. Public prospecting estimates are confidence-scored and should not be treated as exact customer metrics.

brandProfile.targetCustomer: Wellness-minded consumers who buy functional drinks in retail and online

retailSignals.evidence: Store locator and retailer badges visible on sample pages

brandProfile.missionDrivenAngle: Better-for-you soda alternative with gut health education

explanation: Visible reviews, UGC, subscriptions, and retail presence suggest real participation potential.
The loyalty motion appears points-heavy, so earned community behavior may not be fully captured.
Retail buyers appear disconnected from owned DTC profiles, making receipt upload a strong first loop.

flywheelLeaks.description: Rewards language centers on points and VIP tiers, with limited evidence of reviews, referrals, UGC, or zero-party data connected to loyalty.
flywheelLeaks.recommendedFix: Audit the points program and migrate high-intent customers into participation-based rewards.

flywheelLeaks.description: Retail presence is visible, but the sample evidence does not show a receipt upload or retail-to-owned-profile loop.
flywheelLeaks.recommendedFix: Launch a receipt upload challenge to turn retail buyers into owned community profiles.

activationIdeas.title: Turn retail buyers into owned community profiles
activationIdeas.targetBehavior: Upload a retail receipt, join the community profile, and receive a personalized DTC reward
activationIdeas.whyItFits: The brand has retail presence, reviews, UGC, and subscriptions, but no visible retail-to-owned loop.
activationIdeas.rediemValuePropAngle: Connect retail demand to owned customer profiles and follow-on subscriptions.
activationIdeas.suggestedOutboundOneLiner: Your retail and review footprint suggests customers are already participating; Rediem can help convert those offline buyers into owned profiles and repeat DTC loops.

activationIdeas.title: Move points and VIP tiers into participation-based rewards
activationIdeas.targetBehavior: Reward reviews, referrals, UGC, preference completion, and subscription milestones instead of only purchases
activationIdeas.whyItFits: The sample loyalty page emphasizes points and VIP tiers while reviews and UGC appear separate.
activationIdeas.rediemValuePropAngle: Shift loyalty from transaction subsidy to verified community participation.
activationIdeas.suggestedOutboundOneLiner: Your VIP program already has the scaffolding; Rediem can help make the rewards loop about verified participation, not just points.

economicBuyers.title: VP Marketing
economicBuyers.angle: Revenue impact, brand community differentiation, and retention strategy

operatorBuyers.title: Director of Retention
operatorBuyers.angle: Lifecycle, loyalty migration, subscription retention, and campaign execution

technicalBuyers.title: Head of Ecommerce
technicalBuyers.angle: Commerce stack, integrations, data flows, and implementation risk

influencers.title: Community Manager
influencers.angle: UGC, creator participation, community programming, and social proof

recommendedFirstContact.title: Director of Retention
recommendedFirstContact.reason: Most directly owns retention, lifecycle, loyalty, and repeat-purchase loops.

outboundAngles.angleTitle: Retail participation is not yet owned
outboundAngles.whyNow: Retail presence and review activity are visible, but receipt-to-profile capture is not.
outboundAngles.painHypothesis: Retail buyers are creating demand and proof, but their participation is not turning into owned DTC profiles.
outboundAngles.suggestedOneLiner: Rediem can help convert retail buyers into owned community members through receipt upload, rewards, and follow-on subscription loops.

outboundAngles.angleTitle: Points loyalty is leaving community value uncaptured
outboundAngles.whyNow: The rewards page emphasizes points and VIP tiers while reviews and UGC appear separate.
outboundAngles.painHypothesis: The brand may be subsidizing purchases without capturing verified participation.
outboundAngles.suggestedOneLiner: Rediem can help turn points/VIP loyalty into participation-based rewards for reviews, referrals, UGC, and preferences.

n8nExport.sequencerEligibilityReason: Sample dossier does not include a verified email.

evidence.rawExcerpt: Earn points and climb VIP tiers with every purchase.
Customer reviews and product ratings are displayed on the sample review page.
